info.name: MedPoint API (v1)
info.description:
# MedPoint API — v1

Auto-generated from the application routes and their validation rules.

## Getting started
1. Set `baseUrl` (defaults to the staging host).
2. Run **Auth > Login** — the token is captured into `{{accessToken}}` automatically
   and applied to every other request via collection-level Bearer auth.

## STATUS: SCAFFOLD — NOT PRODUCTION READY
These endpoints are CRUD skeletons. In particular:
- **No ownership scoping.** Any authenticated user can currently read and modify
  ANY other user's bookings, payments, wallets and patient profiles.
- **No booking state machine** — `status` is a free-form field.
- **No capacity/concurrency checks** — overbooking is possible.
- **`price_snapshot` is taken from the request**, not derived from the Service.
- **No payment processing** — payments only record intent.

Treat request/response SHAPES as stable enough to build UI against;
do not treat the authorization behaviour as final.
